title: Badge: Ethical Financier
resultSuccessText: You got {{score}} out of {{total}} challenges correct! You're a true Ethical Financier!
resultSuccessLesson: Lesson: Honesty and ethics in financial transactions build trust and a strong reputation.
resultFailText: You got {{score}} out of {{total}} challenges correct. Practice making ethical choices!
resultFailTip: Tip: Always choose honesty over quick gains, and report any unethical behavior you encounter!

challenges.title: Ethical Dilemma 1
challenges.question: You find extra money. What do you do?

challenges.title: Ethical Dilemma 2
challenges.question: Friend asks you to lie for financial gain. Your response?

challenges.title: Ethical Dilemma 3
challenges.question: You see someone cheating in a financial transaction. What do you do?

challenges.title: Ethical Dilemma 4
challenges.question: You're offered money to do something unethical. Your choice?

challenges.title: Ethical Dilemma 5
challenges.question: You can make money by being dishonest. What's your decision?
